The 5-No strategy in flip. Look 72% of all companies never ask for the order the first time and then 65% of all companies never nurture lead. 80% of all your transactions are going to take place between the fifth follow-up and the 12th. What does that tell you? Look 80% of all prospects say no to the first four times you ask and then maybe then they say yes. I want to introduce you to the 5-No strategy. That's the 5-No strategy. This will stack the odds in your favor by introducing the 5-No strategy where you're going to actually be in charge of looking for the 5-No and then knowing I'm close to arriving at my destination. Simply continue to contact the prospect until each one of them has said either no, not now, not yet, at least a full hand of times which is 5. Businesses with 5-No strategies will always enjoy higher conversion rates many times higher than their competitors who have no strategy at all. Strategies like I don't know. See this is what I want you to do. I want you to put in a 5-No strategy. Who's asking for the No? Who's tracking the No? And if you don't know who's asking, who's tracking? Trust me nobody's asking and nobody's looking and nobody's on track to get at least 5 No's.
